name: No-Cook Chocolate Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate over hot water.
2. Cool completely.
3. Blend ricotta with sugar, salt, and vanilla.
4. Beat in egg yolks, incorporating each addition thoroughly.
5. Mix in melted chocolate until well combined.
6. Combine whipped cream with beaten egg whites and fold gently into the chocolate mixture.
7. Pour into prepared pie shell, reserving 1/4 of the mixture for decoration.
8. Refrigerate until filling is set.
9. Spoon reserved mixture into mounds over top of the pie.
10. Chill several hours or overnight.
